arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has no doubts about the quality of his players, but the Italian thinks this season is too early to talk about winning the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Liverpool DELETE Rio Ngumoha footage after Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool have deleted footage of summer signing Rio Ngumoha in first-team training due to his immense performances against the club’s biggest stars. The 16-year-old moved to Anfield in a controversial transfer from Chelsea, with the Blues angered by his decision to leave west London for a Premier League rival.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury latest as two players set to miss Southampton after Wesley Fofana update
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has successfully built a strong backline this season to help them climb to joint-second in the Premier League. However, ahead of the trip to Southampton, Maresca will be without one of his trusted allies in Fofana .
